content_body: This is our second trip to the Blue Ridge Mountains and it just keeps getting better and better. We feel so blessed to have found this amazing place! Your lodge is so comfortable, classy, and convenient! We will recommend to all of our friends! Hope to be back with our adult children in the next year or so. Thank you for sharing your home! It was the perfect retreat for two "very" young 50 year olds. Sending you many heartfelt blessings.
title: Blue Ridge Keeps Getting Better & Better!
